title: Practo is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Practo is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Practo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Practo:
Practo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo!
